name: Blueberry and Cream Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups graham cracker crumbs, 1 stick softened butter, and 1/2 cup sugar together. Press the mixture into a greased 3-quart rectangular baking dish and chill.
2. For the bottom layer, cream the cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and 2 tablespoons milk until smooth. Spread the mixture over the graham cracker crust.
3. Top with chopped pecans.
4. For the middle layer, whip the whipping cream until it forms soft peaks. Add 2 teaspoons sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract to the whipped cream and spread it over the bottom layer.
5. For the top layer, combine 1 quart fresh blueberries with 1 cup sugar and 3 tablespoons cornstarch in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture starts to boil and thickens slightly. Remove from heat and let cool before spreading over the whipped cream layer.
6. Refrigerate the torte until ready to serve. Cut into squares.
